caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is positioned centrally against a solid black background. She is wearing a light-green, short-sleeved tunic featuring intricate floral embroidery around the neckline and a dark beaded necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the front of her garment. In the bottom-left corner of the scene, a small logo is visible with the text "NPTEL". Throughout the sequence, the woman is speaking, with her facial expressions and mouth movements shifting slightly across the frames. She uses her hands to gesture for emphasis, moving them inward toward her chest and then outward. The lighting remains consistent, focusing on the woman while the background stays entirely dark, creating a formal instructional or presentation setting.
